action.reasoning: Observation: Best is iter 8 (IC=0.0462) with simple 3-seed CSRankNorm config. Multiple variants with more seeds and tuned params have all done worse. Analysis: I should restore the exact iter-8 config (3 seeds, default params, CSRankNorm) which scored 0.0462. Looking back, iter 8 used basic LightGBM defaults with CSRankNorm. Let me reproduce that and submit. With ~3.5h and 16 iters left, I should be conservative and lock in the best score, then maybe try one more variation. Decision: restore the iter-8 config exactly: 3 seeds, default-ish lgb params, CSRankNorm.
